# zstack_flow_meter (Resource)

Manages a flow meter in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) The type of the flow meter.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the flow meter.
- `generate_interval` (Number) The generate interval.
- `name` (String) The name of the flow meter.
- `port` (Number) The port of the flow meter.
- `sample` (Number) The sample interval.
- `server` (String) The server of the flow meter.
- `version` (String) The version of the flow meter.

### Read-Only

- `expire_interval` (Number) The expire interval.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the flow meter.
